title: Bulliarda dregei
taxonomy: Bulliarda dregei is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Bulliarda and is native to southern Africa. The classification of Bulliarda dregei is further divided into its kingdom, which is Plantae, and its order, Lamiales. Within the family Acanthaceae, Bulliarda dregei is placed in the tribe Acantheae. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.

The plant's extracts have been studied for their ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and reduce inflammation in various parts of the body.
